special_mechanics.name: air_jumps
special_mechanics.description: Character Boomer possesses multiple air jumps as a distinguishing mechanic

special_mechanics.name: charge_attack
special_mechanics.description: Character Crusher uses charging mechanics to attack opponents directly

special_mechanics.name: ground_shock
special_mechanics.description: Character T-Wrecks (boss) creates ground shock waves with tail attack

special_mechanics.name: jumping_mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Multiple characters featured jumping as primary movement/attack (Tsunami leaps on opponents, Bounder balances on tail while jumping)

tier_notes: Tier 3 - No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Game is a fighting game with character-specific movesets. Wikipedia source provides only qualitative gameplay descriptions and character abilities, not quantified movement or physics values.
